title: Game of Thrones
description: Game of Thrones is an epic fantasy series set in the fictional continents of Westeros and Essos, where noble families vie for control of the Iron Throne and the Seven Kingdoms. As political intrigue, betrayal, and war unfold, an ancient threat emerges beyond the Wall—the White Walkers, an undead army led by the Night King. Meanwhile, Daenerys Targaryen, the last heir of a deposed dynasty, rises with dragons to reclaim her birthright. Jon Snow, a bastard raised in the North, discovers his true lineage and plays a crucial role in the battle between the living and the dead. As alliances shift and power struggles escalate, the fate of Westeros is ultimately decided in a brutal and unpredictable conclusion.
